description: Send notifications to your own Flock destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise flock:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Flock incoming webhook URL from your stored secrets and POST a native Flock {text} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-flock

request.template: {"urls":"flock://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
